steps.label: Approve SSTP by Program Management Council

constraints.text: For Category I project/programs, SSTP must be approved by the governing Program Management Council

steps.label: Obtain concurrence from cognizant SMA managers

constraints.text: For Category I project/programs, SSTP must have concurrence by the cognizant SMA managers and the project's senior engineer

steps.label: Obtain concurrence from project senior engineer
Allocate resources to System Safety Manager

constraints.text: System Safety Manager and the prime contractor (for out-of-house projects) must have the resources to implement the SSTP

steps.label: Allocate resources to prime contractor
Approve SSTP changes by Program Management Council

constraints.text: For Category I project/programs, changes to the SSTP must be approved by the governing PMC
For Category I project/programs, changes to the SSTP must have concurrence by the Chief, Safety and Mission Assurance

steps.label: Obtain concurrence from Chief of Safety and Mission Assurance
steps.action_object: concurrence from Chief, Safety and Mission Assurance

steps.label: Coordinate SSTP with SEMP

constraints.text: When the SSTP is not an integral part of the SEMP, ensure the SSTP is coordinated with the SEMP for the integration of system safety activities with other system engineering technical processes

steps.label: Assign System Safety Manager

constraints.text: The Center SMA Director shall assign a System Safety Manager to have specific responsibility for the development and implementation of the SSTP

steps.label: Verify System Safety Manager expertise in safety analysis
steps.action_object: System Safety Manager expertise in safety analysis

constraints.text: Assigned System Safety Manager must have demonstrated expertise in safety analysis

steps.label: Verify System Safety Manager expertise in probabilistic risk assessment
steps.action_object: System Safety Manager expertise in probabilistic risk assessment techniques

constraints.text: For Category I and II projects, System Safety Manager must have expertise in the application of probabilistic risk assessment techniques

steps.label: Fund personnel with project safety oversight responsibilities
steps.action_object: personnel with project safety oversight responsibilities

constraints.text: All personnel with project safety oversight responsibilities must be funded by other than direct project funding sources

steps.label: Develop SSTP during project formulation phase

constraints.text: SSTP is designed to be a technical planning guide for the technical performance and management of the system safety activities
SSTP can be a stand-alone document, or part of the SMA plan or the Systems Engineering Management Plan (SEMP)

SSTP describes how the technical team(s) responsible for generating and maintaining system safety models will interact with the system engineering organizations, the reporting protocol, and the cost and schedule associated with accomplishing system safety modeling activities in relation to the critical or key events during all phases of the life cycle
SSTP must be developed during the project formulation phase

steps.label: Update SSTP throughout system life cycle

constraints.text: SSTP must be updated throughout the system life cycle

steps.label: Apply graded approach to scope of system safety technical processes
steps.action_object: graded approach to scope of system safety technical processes

constraints.text: The scope of system safety technical processes in the SSTP follows the graded approach specified in Tables 2.1 and 2.2

steps.label: Specify system safety modeling activities in SSTP

constraints.text: SSTP provides the specifics of the system safety modeling activities and describes what and how safety adverse consequences will be modeled, how system safety models (qualitative and probabilistic risk assessments) will be integrated and applied for risk-informed decision making and safety monitoring

steps.label: Document application of system safety modeling to risk-informed decision making
steps.action_object: application of system safety modeling to risk-informed decision making

steps.label: Document application of system safety modeling to safety monitoring
steps.action_object: application of system safety modeling to safety monitoring

steps.label: Establish objectives and scope of system safety tasks
steps.action_object: objectives and scope of system safety tasks

constraints.text: Objectives and scope of the system safety tasks must be established and documented in the SSTP

steps.label: Define applicable safety deliverables

constraints.text: Applicable safety deliverables and performance measures must be defined and documented in the SSTP

steps.label: Define performance measures
Document safety tasks and deliverables in SSTP

constraints.text: Safety tasks and deliverables must be documented in the SSTP

steps.label: Provide technical direction for system safety activities
steps.action_object: technical direction for system safety activities

constraints.text: The assigned System Safety Manager shall provide technical direction for system safety activities

steps.label: Manage implementation of system safety activities

constraints.text: The assigned System Safety Manager shall manage implementation of system safety activities as specified in the SSTP

steps.label: Integrate system safety engineering activities into system engineering processes
steps.action_object: system safety engineering activities into system engineering technical processes

constraints.text: System safety engineering activities must be integrated into system engineering technical processes

steps.label: Determine acceptability of residual risk

constraints.text: Acceptability of residual risk stemming from safety assessments must be determined

steps.label: Integrate specific safety requirements into programmatic requirements
steps.action_object: specific safety requirements into overall programmatic requirements

constraints.text: Specific safety requirements must be integrated into overall programmatic requirements

steps.label: Reflect safety requirements in program and planning documents
steps.action_object: safety requirements in applicable program and planning documents

constraints.text: Safety requirements must be reflected in applicable program and planning documents including the statement of work for contractor designs

steps.label: Include safety requirements in contractor statement of work
steps.action_object: safety requirements in statement of work for contractor designs

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in program design

constraints.text: Appropriate safety participation must be maintained in the program design, tests, operations, failures and mishaps, and contractor system safety activities at a level consistent with mishap potential for the life of the program

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in tests and operations
steps.action_object: safety participation in tests and operations

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in failures and mishaps
steps.action_object: safety participation in failures and mishaps

steps.label: Maintain safety participation in contractor system safety activities
steps.action_object: safety participation in contractor system safety activities

steps.label: Establish independent safety reporting channel

constraints.text: An independent safety reporting channel must be established to keep the Center SMA Director apprised of the system safety status (including tests and operations), particularly regarding problem areas that may require assistance from the Center, the NASA Engineering and Safety Center, or Headquarters

steps.label: Report system safety status to Center SMA Director
steps.action_object: system safety status to Center SMA Director

steps.label: Report problem areas requiring assistance
steps.action_object: problem areas requiring assistance from Center, NESC, or Headquarters

steps.label: Support OSMA requirements for audits

constraints.text: OSMA requirements for audits, assessments, and reviews must be supported

steps.label: Support OSMA requirements for assessments
Support OSMA requirements for reviews
